description: Core permissions for the dashboard and the tray popover. These windows load from the app's OWN loopback server — a REMOTE origin to Tauri — so `remote` is required for the few IPC commands the UI invokes (window MOVE dragging, frameless RESIZE dragging from the popover's edge/corner handles, and F11 fullscreen); everything else goes over the HTTP API. The server binds 127.0.0.1 and `server_url()` builds `http://127.0.0.1:<port>/…`, so the pattern MUST use the literal `127.0.0.1` host (URLPattern does NOT treat `localhost` and `127.0.0.1` as equivalent). The `:*` port wildcard is required because the port is dynamic; the pathname auto-fills to `*` so root, `/popover.html`, and `?query` URLs all match. `localhost:*` is kept for the Vite devUrl in debug builds.
